content.en:
The Dragon Shadow Palace Master nodded slightly, and immediately let the many Palace Masters disperse.

And then, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master didn't cultivate, he had been cultivating for too long, and his entire humane heart was almost out of order, so he needed to relax.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master became a half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, but this matter did not cause changes in the outside world, and even the outside world did not know that there was a Dragon Shadow Palace Master in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

With the passage of time, more and more forbidden treasures were born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but the small Forbidden Void Realm was not born again, only the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm was born one after another, and seven or eight were born one after another.

These forbidden void realms were almost all divided between the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain, and the other three Nine Heavens forces were no longer capable of snatching them.

......

With the passage of time, more and more Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors were born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

In the past, it was too difficult for a Dao Ancestor to condense the power of the Dark Tabo, but now he has many treasures that can allow the Dao Ancestor to give birth to the power of the Dark Tabo, such as the Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace, there are many such treasures, and even the three major Nine Heaven forces and some Eight Heaven forces have the means to cultivate several supreme Dao Ancestors.

In the past, the status of a supreme Dao Ancestor was very high, almost the master of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but now it seems sparse and ordinary.

If he didn't have the strength of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, he wouldn't even dare to be arrogant.

After all, more and more powerhouses appeared in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and even half-step domain ancestors were emerging in an endless stream, if there were no invincible Dao Ancestors or a large number of supreme Dao Ancestors in charge, maybe they would be destroyed at some point.

And during this period of time, many forces that only had ordinary Dao Ancestors or three or four Heavenly Dao Ancestors were wiped out one by one.

For example, if a forbidden treasure appears near a certain force, the next day this force may not exist.

this day.

A forbidden treasure land has appeared near the force where the God of War Tower is located, and it is a large forbidden treasure land.

The value of the large-scale forbidden treasure land was far inferior to that of the Forbidden Void Realm, but it also attracted many, many Dao Ancestors.

After all, such a large forbidden treasure land will give birth to at least a dozen forbidden treasures, as well as a large number of forbidden treasures, no one does not need forbidden treasures and forbidden treasures, and some of the forbidden treasures are of high value, and even to the invincible Dao Ancestor is of great help.

What's more, this forbidden treasure is too close to the God of War Tower.

Even at this time, it was too late for the people of the God of War Tower to evacuate, because other forces would suspect that the God of War Tower had taken the more precious forbidden treasure, and it was impossible to let the God of War Tower leave.

Of course, the main reason is that the God of War Tower is too weak.

Due to the fact that the God of War Tower was relatively weak before, it did not gain any benefits from the Forbidden Zerg incident and the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle at all, nor did it participate in the competition for the Forbidden Void Realm, so its strength improved relatively slowly.

At present, the God of War Tower only has one Fifth-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, dozens of Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and there are probably more than three hundred other Dao Ancestors, which is already many, many times stronger than in the past.

But this kind of strength is too weak in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and it is not worth mentioning at all, and it barely has the qualifications of the Five Heavens Force.

At this time.

The God of War Tower was gloomy, and they had already felt that one Dao Ancestor had broken through the sky, and among them there were many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors and Supreme Dao Ancestors.

"Tower Master, ask for the protection of the Zhan Tian Sect!"

A Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor pleaded.

"It's useless!" The God of War Tower Lord said in despair: "The War Heaven Sect will not help us, although we have taken refuge in the War Heaven Sect, but the War Heaven Sect is only the Eight Heavens Force, and there has not yet been an invincible Dao Ancestor, where can we dare to bless us." If they had blessed us, the losses would have been terrible, and they wouldn't have been so stupid!"

That's when it happened.

A group of Dao Ancestors have descended on the Battle Heaven Sect, this is a group of Dao Ancestors of the Six or Seven Heavens, they are not in a hurry to enter the large forbidden treasure land, but want to gain benefits from the God of War Tower, and even want to capture some Dao Ancestors to use to lead out the Great Terror.

There is no way, the strength is weak, it is like this, and it is impossible to control one's own life.

"Everyone, our Zhantian Sect really hasn't been to that large-scale forbidden treasure land, and we haven't obtained any treasures!"

The God of War Tower Lord hurriedly said.

In fact, the Dao Ancestor of the God of War Tower had indeed entered that large forbidden treasure land and obtained a lot of forbidden strange things, but he let those Dao Ancestors come out in time.

But all this, he didn't dare to tell these Dao Ancestors.

"Hmph, when will this large forbidden treasure be born, I don't know, in case it was born early, you will take out all the good things!"

A Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor said coldly.

Just as the Lord of the God of War Tower wanted to explain, this group of Dao Ancestors directly started it, and they didn't want to talk nonsense at all, after all, time was very important to them, and it was impossible to waste time on the God of War Tower.

Rumble!!!!

The Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor's blow bombarded the War God Tower's Protector Array, but this large array could only block the attack of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, although it could also block the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor's blow, but it could only block one blow.

I saw that after this blow, the Great Array of the God of War Tower Protector Sect cracked.

And the other Dao Ancestors also made a move, instantly shattering the Protector Sect Great Array.

"I'm fighting with you!"

The God of War Tower Lord burned his flesh and soul, and unleashed a full force attack comparable to that of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, crashing into the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

However, it was all in vain.

That Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor had blown up the God of War Tower Lord with just one punch, and the difference in strength between the two sides was too big, and it was not a level at all.

The Lord of the God of War Tower has fallen!

"Tower Master!"

One Dao Ancestor and True Ancestor of the God of War Tower shouted in despair.

These Dao Ancestors did not kill the people of the God of War Tower, but prepared to capture these Dao Ancestors, only to see that they easily captured a famous Dao Ancestor and included him in the inner world.

Among the many Dao Ancestors of the God of War Tower, Yun Zi Dao Ancestor is also a relatively powerful one, due to his good luck and high potential, he is now a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the top Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the God of War Tower, and he even has the hope of taking charge of the God of War Tower in the future.

But now, she was also targeted by a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, only to see that the other party conjured up a monstrous giant hand and grabbed her, this power was far beyond her imagination, and she couldn't shake the opponent's attack with all her strength.

"It's over!"

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden said in despair.

But at this moment, a spear pierced the body of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

And in the void, a powerful six or seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors were pierced by spears one after another.

In an instant, the many Dao Ancestors who came to invade the God of War Tower were all killed in an instant.

Wow!

A figure appeared, appeared in front of the Yunzi Divine Maiden, and said with a smile: "Yunzi Divine Maiden, long time no see!"

The Yunzi Divine Maiden looked at the familiar face in front of her and said in shock, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors!"
